     The Numbers Business Report

Hope Springs (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $63,536,011Details
International Box Office $69,549,284
Worldwide Box Office $133,085,295
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,547,486
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,999,488
Total $15,546,974
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kay and Arnold are a devoted couple, but decades of marriage have left Kay wanting to spice things up and reconnect with her husband. When she hears of a renowned couple's specialist in the small town of Great Hope Springs, she attempts to persuade her skeptical husband, a steadfast man of routine, to get on a plane for a week of marriage therapy. Just convincing the stubborn Arnold to go on the retreat is hard enough - the real challenge for both of them comes as they shed their bedroom hang-ups and try to re-ignite the spark that caused them to fall for each other in the first place.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,650,121 (23.1% of total gross)
Legs:4.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,361 opening theaters/2,441 max. theaters, 6.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,463,656

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 8th, 2012 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 9th, 2012 (Wide) (Hungary)
August 17th, 2012 (Wide) (Brazil)
August 22nd, 2012 (Wide) (Philippines)
August 23rd, 2012 (Wide) (New Zealand)
August 23rd, 2012 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: December 4th, 2012 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic content involving sexuality.
(Rating bulletin 2226, 6/6/2012)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Autumn Years, December Romance, Relationship Advice, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Social setting: Therapists / Therapy
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Mandate Pictures, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Film 360, Escape Artists
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Kay and Arnold are a devoted couple, but decades of marriage have left Kay wanting to spice things up and reconnect with her husband. When she hears of a renowned couple's specialist in the small town of Great Hope Springs, she attempts to persuade her skeptical husband, a steadfast man of routine, to get on a plane for a week of marriage therapy. Just convincing the stubborn Arnold to go on the retreat is hard enough - the real challenge for both of them comes as they shed their bedroom hang-ups and try to re-ignite the spark that caused them to fall for each other in the first place.
